title: Customer Relationship Officer
description:
Customer Relationship Officer (CRS)

— Let’s Make Customers Smile😊

At OneO2Plants, we breathe freshness into space—and we’re looking for a friendly, organised Customer Relationship Officer (CRS) to support our customers and keep our service operations and office admin running smoothly.


Job Title: Customer Relationship Officer
Employment Type: Full-Time / Permanent
Level: Entry Level
Location: West Area
Working Hours: Mon–Fri, 8:30am–5:30pm
Salary Range: $2,300–$2,800
Annual Leave: 14 days/year
Other Leaves: After confirmation, under MOM requirements
Salary Payment: Monthly (end of month)


About the Role

You’ll be the friendly first point of contact for customers—handling enquiries, service requests, and complaints across channels like calls, WhatsApp and email. You’ll also coordinate with internal teams to resolve issues quickly, keep CRM records accurate, and provide admin support to ensure the CRS function runs efficiently.

Key Responsibilities 🚀

A) Customer Support & Service Delivery

- Handle customer enquiries promptly and professionally (calls/WhatsApp/emails)
- Provide accurate info on products/services, processes, timelines, and next steps
- Log and update cases/tickets iwith complete notes and documents
- Keep customers updated and ensure proper closure confirmation

B) Customer Experience & Escalation Support

- Manage service issues within your scope using a solutions-first approach
- Escalate complex/high-impact cases to the CRS Manager with full details and documentation
- Follow up after resolution to confirm customer satisfaction

C) Operations & Coordination

- Coordinate with Ops/Sales/Finance/Service teams to resolve requests efficiently
- Support updates to SOPs, templates, scripts, and checklists
- Flag recurring issues and share feedback to reduce repeat cases

D) Administrative Support

- Maintain customer and office supplies records, filing, and documentation control
- Prepare/issue standard documents (e.g., acknowledgements, service forms, confirmations, internal request forms)
- Support scheduling and coordination (appointments, follow-ups, site visits where relevant)
- Assist with onboarding admin for new customers (document collection, system updates, verification)
- Support ad-hoc admin tasks assigned by the CRS Manager

Requirements ✅

- GCE ‘A’ Level / Diploma preferred (or equivalent relevant experience)
- 1–2 years customer service / customer relationship experience (B2B is a plus, not a must). Fresh graduates are welcome.
- Comfortable with CRM systems and MS Office / Google Workspace (Excel/Sheets)
- Strong communication and people skills; able to handle difficult conversations professionally
- Organised, meticulous, proactive, and a team player

🌱 Grow Your Career with OneO2Plants — Apply Today!  🌱

postedCompany.description:
OneO2Plants PTE. LTD.

Established in 2008, OneO2Plants is a subsidiary of Far East Flora – an integrated floriculture firm with over 40 years of experience. We endeavor to bring life and freshness to the space of every business in Asia by making our extensive range of plants and pots available for rent in your office space.

With our wide variety of plants and European pot designs, OneO2Plants can provide the options and service level you require. We are able to provide plant rental for offices, restaurants, hotels, commercial buildings, shopping malls, and events. Our rapidly growing clientele in Singapore can attest to our quality service, enthusiasm and reliability. With renewable annual rental contracts, our plant nurturers will visit your premises every fortnightly to ensure that your plants stay healthy and fresh throughout the year.

Our other services also include plants for events, plants for purchase and floral arrangements. Whichever service you require, you can be assured that customer satisfaction is our number one priority.
postedCompany.name: ONEO2PLANTS PTE. LTD.
